plumbers.name: Prestige Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.summary: Prestige Plumbing shows strong technical skills and emergency availability, but has concerning issues with follow-up service and potentially high pricing. While they respond quickly to initial calls and have loyal long-term customers, poor callback service and possible overcharging create reliability concerns for emergency situations.
redFlags: Multiple unreturned calls after initial service
Significantly higher quotes than competitors
Service call fees even for minimal work

plumbers.name: Cork's Plumbing, Heating, & Cooling
plumbers.summary: Cork's Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with 24-hour service and quick repairs, but has concerning issues with customer service consistency and technical thoroughness. While they excel at fast furnace and plumbing repairs, some customers report incomplete diagnostics and poor phone service.
redFlags: Technician allegedly gave dangerous advice about lowering gas valve
May not thoroughly diagnose root causes of problems
Phone staff reportedly refusing business

plumbers.name: Norman Mechanical Inc
plumbers.summary: Norman Mechanical shows strong technical skills and emergency responsiveness, with most customers praising Joe's expertise and quick service. However, there's a serious concern about accountability when damage occurs, with one customer reporting property damage and unprofessional handling by management.
redFlags: Management reportedly dismissive when property damage occurs
History of causing damage during HOA work

plumbers.name: Zenks Plumbing LLC
plumbers.summary: Zenks Plumbing shows strong technical expertise and willingness to help customers troubleshoot over the phone, but has concerning reliability issues with scheduling and communication. While most customers praise Matt's honest work and problem-solving skills, there's a significant red flag about not showing up for scheduled work without notice.
redFlags: Failed to show up for scheduled work without calling or communicating

plumbers.name: Elite Plumbing and Piping Inc.
plumbers.summary: Elite Plumbing and Piping Inc. has excellent customer satisfaction with all 5-star reviews praising Dave's professionalism, thoroughness, and reasonable pricing. However, with only 5 reviews, there's limited data to fully assess reliability for emergency situations.

plumbers.name: Ellison Plumbing & Heating, Inc.
plumbers.summary: Ellison Plumbing shows strong customer satisfaction with reasonable pricing and professional service, but the very limited review sample (only 5 reviews) makes it difficult to fully assess reliability. The positive feedback emphasizes punctuality and quality work, though one blank 1-star review raises minor concerns.

plumbers.name: Andersen Drain & Sewer Cleaning
plumbers.summary: Andersen Drain & Sewer Cleaning shows strong potential with excellent same-day service and upfront pricing, but the limited review count and one pricing complaint warrant caution. They appear reliable for sewer line work based on available feedback.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.summary: Roto-Rooter Aurora has skilled technicians who provide thorough diagnostics and honest service when they show up. However, significant scheduling reliability issues and poor customer service interactions create frustration for customers needing timely plumbing repairs.
redFlags: Multiple appointment cancellations and delays spanning days
Dismissive customer service that hangs up on customers
Charges service fees without performing actual repairs

plumbers.name: Emergency Plumbing service
plumbers.summary: This plumbing company shows strong technical skills and excellent customer service from their master plumber Konstantin, but has a concerning track record including one catastrophic incident that caused $35,000 in damages. While most customers praise their professionalism and reliability, the severe emergency response failure raises serious questions about their junior staff's competency.
redFlags: $35,000 in damages from improper emergency toilet unclogging procedure
Junior plumber gave dangerous advice causing extensive flooding
Company refused to take responsibility for catastrophic damage they caused

plumbers.name: TJM Sewer and Plumbing
plumbers.summary: TJM Sewer and Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with same-day service and quick diagnostics, but has serious concerns about billing practices and licensing issues. While most customers praise their efficiency and professionalism, one detailed complaint about overcharging and unlicensed work raises significant red flags.
redFlags: Customer reported they were unlicensed for work performed
Alleged overcharging and billing disputes
Failed to honor estimate fee credit agreement

plumbers.name: Affordable Plumbing Solutions, Inc.
plumbers.summary: Affordable Plumbing Solutions shows potential with competitive pricing and some customers reporting excellent emergency response times. However, reliability concerns including missed appointments and poor follow-up service create significant risk for emergency situations.
redFlags: Missed confirmed appointments
Left customer's faucet box with tools at job site
Poor follow-up despite repeated contact attempts

plumbers.name: A&P Plumbing and Sewer
plumbers.summary: A&P Plumbing shows strong technical skills and professionalism based on positive reviews, but a recent serious complaint about taking payment without performing work raises significant concerns. While they offer 24-hour service, their communication and follow-through may be inconsistent.
redFlags: Recent complaint of taking thousands in deposit without performing work or responding to customer contact

plumbers.name: Community Plumbing Company
plumbers.summary: Community Plumbing shows strong technical skills and emergency responsiveness, with customers praising their efficiency and reasonable rates. However, a serious complaint about failing to return $700 in promised warranty reimbursement and ignoring follow-up calls raises significant trust concerns.
redFlags: Failed to reimburse $700 warranty refund and ignored multiple customer calls for 3+ months

plumbers.name: artisan water group
plumbers.summary: Artisan Water Group specializes in water features and pond work rather than traditional plumbing emergencies. While Matt receives excellent reviews for his waterscape design and pond cleaning services, there's limited evidence of emergency plumbing capabilities or 24-hour availability.

plumbers.name: Hartwig Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.summary: Hartwig Plumbing & Heating has excellent feedback for quality work and professionalism, but with only one review, there's limited data to assess reliability for emergency situations. The single review suggests good craftsmanship, but more customer feedback would be needed to confidently recommend for urgent plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Hartwig Mechanical
plumbers.summary: While Hartwig Mechanical shows promise with quick emergency response (within an hour for a pipe burst), multiple reviews consistently cite dangerous driving behavior by their technicians. The limited positive feedback about actual work quality is overshadowed by serious safety concerns about their drivers.
redFlags: Multiple complaints about reckless driving and phone use while driving
Pattern of dangerous behavior spanning years
Safety concerns with company vehicles

plumbers.name: Plumbing Systems LLC
plumbers.summary: Plumbing Systems LLC has a perfect 5-star rating, but with only 3 reviews and extremely limited feedback, there's insufficient data to confidently recommend them for emergency situations. The reviews lack specific details about service quality, response times, or emergency availability.
redFlags: Insufficient review data for emergency decision-making
No verified emergency service capability

plumbers.name: Cool Plumbing - Woodstock
plumbers.summary: Cool Plumbing has very limited reliable review data with only one actual plumbing review out of four total reviews. The other reviews appear to be misplaced B&B reviews, making it difficult to assess their plumbing services reliably.
redFlags: Only one verifiable plumbing review
Confusion with business identity/listings
Insufficient data to verify reliability
